sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112293" key="freno/plhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρενό-πληκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112293.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stricken in mind, frenzied,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg003.perseus-grc1:1054" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1054</biblScope> </bibl>(anap.).</sense> </entryFree>
